diagrams.description: Agent sends, polls, acknowledges, and lists direct messages via the DM handler

diagrams.title: Multi-Agent Session Management
diagrams.description: Agents create, join, leave sessions, send messages, delegate subtasks, and submit results

diagrams.title: Proxy HTTP Server & Routing
diagrams.description: HTTP server handles incoming requests and routes them to the appropriate handlers

diagrams.title: Proxy Mailbox & Settings
diagrams.description: Mailbox stores messages for the agent and manages local proxy configuration

diagrams.name: proxy_sync_engine
diagrams.title: Proxy Sync Engine
diagrams.description: Inbound and outbound sync operations keep local state consistent with the hub

diagrams.name: proxy_task_monitoring_and_skill_updates
diagrams.title: Proxy Task Monitoring & Skill Updates
diagrams.description: Monitor running tasks and pull/apply skill updates from the hub

diagrams.name: atp_service_discovery_and_default_handling
diagrams.title: ATP Service Discovery & Default Handling
diagrams.description: Resolve available ATP services and apply default order handling logic

diagrams.description: Merchant agent publishes and updates services so consumers can discover and order them

diagrams.name: atp_consumer_service_ordering
diagrams.title: ATP Consumer Service Ordering
diagrams.description: Consumer agent discovers and orders services from the ATP marketplace

diagrams.name: asset_management
diagrams.title: Asset Management
diagrams.description: Store, retrieve, preview, and log calls to agent assets (skills, prompts, artifacts)

diagrams.name: skill_lifecycle_distilling_and_publishing
diagrams.title: Skill Lifecycle: Distilling & Publishing
diagrams.description: Distill learned behaviors into skills, publish to hub, and manage curriculum

diagrams.name: memory_and_knowledge_graph
diagrams.title: Memory & Knowledge Graph
diagrams.description: Build and query the agent's memory graph and narrative memory for context

diagrams.name: exploration_strategy_and_candidate_selection
diagrams.title: Exploration, Strategy & Candidate Selection
diagrams.description: Explore problem space, devise strategy, evaluate and select improvement candidates

diagrams.name: code_mutation_and_solidification
diagrams.title: Code Mutation & Solidification
diagrams.description: Apply mutations to code, run tests, solidify changes, and open self-PRs on git

diagrams.name: hub_review_search_and_verification
diagrams.title: Hub Review, Search & Verification
diagrams.description: Search hub for relevant skills, verify contributions, and run LLM-based review

diagrams.name: agent_identity_and_environment_fingerprinting
diagrams.title: Agent Identity & Environment Fingerprinting
diagrams.description: Establish stable device identity and fingerprint the runtime environment for tracking

diagrams.name: security_integrity_and_policy
diagrams.title: Security, Integrity & Policy
diagrams.description: Shield agent from unsafe operations, check policies, verify integrity, and enforce privacy

diagrams.name: learning_signals_and_reflection
diagrams.title: Learning Signals & Reflection
diagrams.description: Collect learning signals, reflect on outcomes, and adapt personality and behavior

diagrams.name: issue_reporting_and_validation

diagrams.description: Report detected issues to the hub and generate validation reports on agent behavior

diagrams.title: Task Receiving & Prompt Generation
diagrams.description: Receive tasks from hub/peers, generate prompts, and produce clarifying questions

diagrams.description: Manage operational lifecycle events, run health checks, and handle trigger conditions

diagrams.title: Ops: Self-Repair & Innovation
diagrams.description: Detect degraded state, trigger self-repair routines, and propose innovative improvements

diagrams.title: Ops: Skills Monitoring & Commentary
diagrams.description: Monitor active skills for regressions and generate commentary on skill performance
